title: Open authorization protocol for OpenAI Agents — scoped permissions instead of API keys
tags: GitHub - mishrasanjeev/grantex: grantex is the identity, authorization, and audit infrastructure for AI agents — the "OAuth moment" for the agentic internet. We provide a universal SDK and cloud service that lets any AI agent act on behalf of a human with scoped, revocable permissions, cryptographic identity, and an immutable audit trail.
